verification.target_vocab_notes: 結婚 appears with する verb in 結婚する (to marry)
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: は particle, time expression 来年, verb in dictionary form. All N5 patterns
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Simple future with dictionary form. Vocabulary: 彼女, 来年 are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal marriage concept
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. Clear usage of target vocabulary with simple future tense

verification.target_vocab_notes: 結婚 appears in 結婚する construction
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~ている (嫌がっている) which is N4 continuous grammar. Also contains のを nominalization which is borderline N4
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: ~ている and のを both N4+. Vocabulary: 彼女, 彼, 嫌がる are N5. Length: Long. Context: Universal but complex
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 grammar ~ている. Also uses のを nominalization. Too complex for N5

verification.target_vocab_notes: 結婚 appears in 結婚する
verification.grammar_notes: Contains のか nominalization + question which is borderline N4. Also かなあ is wondering/uncertainty expression that's N4
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: のかなあ pattern is N4 speculation. Vocabulary: 彼女, 彼 are N5. Length: Medium. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 grammar pattern のかなあ for speculation/wondering. Too advanced

verification.target_vocab_notes: 置く appears in て-form おいて in the phrase 一軒おいて (one house over)
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~なら conditional (その家なら) which is N4 grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: なら conditional is N4. Vocabulary: 家, 隣 are N5. Length: Medium. Context: Requires understanding idiomatic 一軒おいて
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 conditional なら. Also uses idiomatic expression 一軒おいて which is complex

verification.target_vocab_notes: 置く appears in compound 置き時計 (table clock, mantel clock)
verification.kana_notes: Shows おきどけい but should be おきどけい. The kanji 時 can be read as とけい but the reading given is どけい which seems like a typo
verification.grammar_notes: Contains passive form 使われている (is being used) which is N4 passive + ~ている continuous
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Passive + ~ている is N4. Vocabulary: 古い, 時計 are N5. Length: Medium. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 passive and ~ている grammar. Too advanced for N5

verification.target_vocab_notes: 置く appears in て-form ておく (to do in advance/keep)
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~ておく auxiliary which is N4 grammar expressing preparation or maintaining state. Also のよ ending is N4 emphatic feminine particle
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: ~ておく is N4, のよ is N4. Vocabulary: 目, 開ける are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ~ておく auxiliary construction. Also uses のよ which is N4

verification.target_vocab_notes: Duplicate of example_index 2. Same sentence
verification.grammar_notes: Same as example 2 - contains N4 grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Same as example 2
verification.overall_notes: DUPLICATE of example_index 2. Should be flagged for removal. Also contains N4 grammar

verification.target_vocab_notes: Sentence has いておく but this appears to be a typo in the Japanese. Should probably be しておく (keep it clean). The いて doesn't make grammatical sense here
verification.kana_notes: Japanese sentence has typo: きれいにいておく doesn't make sense. Should be きれいにしておく. Kana reflects the broken Japanese
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~ておく which is N4 grammar. Also sentence has grammatical error
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar would be N4 if corrected. Vocabulary: 妹, 部屋, いつも, きれい are N5
verification.overall_notes: CRITICAL ERROR: Japanese sentence has typo/grammatical error. Should be しておく not いておく. Also contains N4 grammar

verification.target_vocab_notes: 置く appears in ~ておく form
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~ておく which is N4 auxiliary. Also ように (so that) is N4 purpose expression
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: ~ておく and ように are both N4. Vocabulary: 部屋, 窓, 閉める are N5. Length: Medium. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Contains multiple N4 patterns: ~ておく and ように. Too advanced for N5

verification.target_vocab_notes: 渡る appears in compound verb 行き渡る (to spread, circulate)
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~ている (行き渡っている) which is N4 continuous grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: ~ている is N4. Vocabulary: 雑誌, 広く are N5. Length: Medium. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ~ている grammar. Too advanced for N5

verification.target_vocab_notes: 渡る appears in past tense 渡った
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: は particle, を particle, past tense. Simple structure
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Basic past tense. Vocabulary: 彼, 海 are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal crossing concept
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. Simple past tense with clear usage of target verb

verification.target_vocab_notes: 渡る appears in volitional form 渡ろう
verification.grammar_notes: Contains volitional form ~ろう which is N4 grammar (beyond basic ましょう)
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Volitional form is N4. Vocabulary: 道 is N5. Length: Very short. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 volitional form ~ろう. Should use ましょう for N5

verification.target_vocab_notes: 渡る appears in past tense form 渡った
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: は particle, を particle, past tense
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Simple past tense. Vocabulary: 橋 is N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal bridge crossing
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. Clear and simple usage

verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Basic negative masu-form. Vocabulary: 私, タバコ are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. Simple negative sentence

verification.target_vocab_notes: 吸う appears in て-form 吸って in ~てもいい construction
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: を particle, ~てもいい (permission) which is taught at N5, か question particle
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: ~てもいい permission pattern is N5. Vocabulary: タバコ are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. Shows permission pattern ~てもいい which is N5 grammar

verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. Natural sentence with past tense

verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Possessive and past copula. Vocabulary: 私, 背, 高い, 学生 are N5. Length: Medium. Context: Universal

verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. Simple family member sentence

verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 grammar ~たいものです. Too advanced for N5
